title: GRCH-382 # 1 Story of an affair OL covered in the sexual desire of a middle-aged man 7 men and women apartment story ~ Indecent daily life of residents ~ - Yukine Sakuragi
description: The ordinary office lady Sakura Oda continued to have an affair with her business partner, Arima. One day, his neighbor Takai sees a scene in which Arima's wife gets in and turns into a shrine. As a result, the distance between Sakura and Takai begins to shrink, but Arima, who has been out of contact since Shuraba, suddenly comes to Sakura's house. He said, "I'm going to break up with my wife."
